case_title: CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. VS. TULPER AND COMPANY (A CORPORATION) AKD TURNER & ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.
